title: Verify the fix is correct and reproducible
description: Review the implemented changes to ensure they correctly pass unique personalities to each agent

implementResult.changesSummary: Implemented Option A: (1) docker-compose.yml: added bind-mount './companies:/paperclip/companies:ro' to paperclip service. (2) setup.sh: replaced static AGENT_DEFS with build_agent_body() function generating JSON with instructionsFilePath, capabilities, and reportsTo. PM created first, its ID passed to subsequent agents. (3) .paperclip.yaml: added instructionsFilePath and reportsTo fields per agent.
implementResult.setupScriptChanges: Replaced AGENT_DEFS array with AGENT_CAPABILITIES/AGENT_NAMES/AGENT_ROLES/AGENT_MODELS maps + build_agent_body() function using python3 for JSON assembly. instructionsFilePath set to /paperclip/companies/go-north/agents/<slug>/AGENTS.md. reportsTo resolved dynamically from PM agent ID. Idempotency preserved.
